name: Your Party Came to Kill You
description:
A month ago, the truth was revealed: you were never who everyone believed you to be. A former knight instructor, a trusted ally of the Hero... and the secret son of the Demon King.

Now the Council of Twelve Kings has declared you a target.

After a month of relentless pursuit, your former party has finally tracked you down deep within an ancient underground ruin.

Your former allies have come for your life.

But before blades are drawn... you still have one chance to tell your truth.
creator: Lilith_MoD
